code: import React from'react';import TeamPage from'./RedTeam';import{useIdioma}from'../context/IdiomaContext';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const PurpleTeam=()=>{const _useIdioma=useIdioma(),t=_useIdioma.t;const team={id:'purple-team',badgeIcon:'fa-handshake',badgeLabel:t('purpleTeam','badge'),sectionClass:'purple-section',title:t('purpleTeam','title'),desc:t('purpleTeam','desc'),services:[{icon:'fa-exchange-alt',name:'Simulacros',desc:'Ejercicios controlados de ataque/defensa'},{icon:'fa-chart-line',name:'Métricas',desc:'Medición de efectividad defensiva'},{icon:'fa-sync',name:'Feedback Loop',desc:'Mejora continua bidireccional'},{icon:'fa-graduation-cap',name:'Training',desc:'Capacitación conjunta de equipos'}],tools:['Atomic Red Team','MITRE ATT&CK','Caldera','Prelude','Vectra']};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TeamPage,{team:team});};export default PurpleTeam;
